name: thread clue tier derives from status

source.purpose: Investigation satisfaction should be derived from existing clue status/count against a thread and surfaced as a terse mutable read.

clue_attached_1.title: Stamped Receipt
clue_attached_1.content: The receipt was stamped before the hearing opened.
clue_attached_1.retrievalCue: Receipt timing contradicts the official sequence.

clue_attached_2.title: Counter Log
clue_attached_2.content: The counter log skips the accused family's arrival.
clue_attached_2.retrievalCue: The ledger has a deliberate gap.

input.playerInput: Compare the receipt against the counter log.

perTurnDeltaIncludes: The intake problem (thread_spine): active · tension 5/10 · clue trail: load_bearing
